title: satureja caroliniana
intro: Satureja caroliniana, also known as Carolina savory, is a perennial herb that belongs to the mint family and is native to the southeastern United States. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Carolina savory include its ability to aid digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as a natural antihistamine, making it a valuable remedy for allergies. Herbal preparations of Carolina savory include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to reap its medicinal benefits and promote overall well-being.
